name: I slipped and fell at work in Murray on some spilled oil, what do I do right now?

mainEntity.name: I slipped and fell at work in Murray on some spilled oil, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer now, get medical care, document everything, and file workers' comp claim quickly in Utah.
acceptedAnswer.description: Report the incident to your employer immediately and seek medical attention, even if injuries seem minor. In Utah workers' compensation system, this starts your claim process for no-fault benefits covering medical bills and lost wages[1][2]. Key factors: Document the scene with photos if possible, get witness names, and avoid giving recorded statements to insurance without advice; Utah has a 1-year filing deadline from injury date. Get treated promptly, notify supervisor in writing, and file Form 12 with the Utah Labor Commission within 180 days for best results. Preserve evidence like clothing. Consult a workers' comp specialist early to protect your rights.

description: Report to employer now, get medical care, document everything, and file workers' comp claim quickly in Utah.
